mapper.select: SELECT o.*, a.username as operator_username, a.name as operator_name, i.id as item_id, i.quantity, i.price, i.amount, i.product_id, i.product_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN admin a ON o.operator_id = a.id LEFT JOIN order_item i ON o.id = i.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
status = #{status, typeHandler=com.swiftstock.config.OrderStatusTypeHandler},
customer_name = #{customerName}, customer_phone = #{customerPhone}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, remark = #{remark}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, a.username as operator_username, a.name as operator_name, i.id as item_id, i.quantity, i.price, i.amount, i.product_id, i.product_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN admin a ON o.operator_id = a.id LEFT JOIN order_item i ON o.id = i.order_id ORDER BY o.created_time DESC

SELECT o.*, a.username as operator_username, a.name as operator_name, i.id as item_id, i.quantity, i.price, i.amount, p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, p.category_id, p.description as product_description, p.price as product_price, p.stock_quantity, p.min_stock_level, p.supplier FROM orders o LEFT JOIN admin a ON o.operator_id = a.id LEFT JOIN order_item i ON o.id = i.order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT MAX(order_no) FROM orders WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
